description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image globally but runs the production job in a ruby:latest image. Define a single stage named production. Add a production job of type deploy that only runs on the master branch, executes the commands apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y ruby-dev, gem install dpl, and dpl --provider=heroku --app=$HEROKU_PROJECT_NAME --api-key=$HEROKU_API_KEY to deploy the app to Heroku.
